steps.description:
Click the "Create" button for the "Bot App with SSO Enabled" sample in the "Samples" tab of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.
And input ${{var:app_name:sso-bot}} into the run time variable.
Click the "View prompts" button in the chat suggestions area of the sso-botlocal tab within Microsoft Teams (web interface), located in the lower-right corner above the message input box.
Click the "Show" prompt suggestion labeled "Show user profile using Single Sign On feature" in the popup from sso-botlocal within the Microsoft Teams web interface.
Click the "Send" button in the chat input area of the sso-botlocal channel within the Microsoft Teams web application.
Click the "Add" button in the sso-botlocal card within the chat panel of Microsoft Teams (web interface) to add the bot for personal use.
Click the "Accept" button on the Microsoft permissions request dialog within the login.microsoftonline.com interface to grant app access.
